description_long: This is a double-headed battle axe with a striking, fantasy-inspired design. The blades are large, symmetrical, and crafted from a translucent, icy blue material with darker blue marbling, giving them a mystical appearance. The central head of the axe features ornate metallic detailing, possibly steel or iron, with decorative flourishes and a dark, weathered finish. The handle is straight, cylindrical, and reinforced with metallic bands and decorative elements, featuring a mix of dark metal and turquoise accents. The grip area appears textured for secure handling, and the pommel is rounded with a matching blue-green hue. This axe is both functional and ornamental, likely intended for display or ceremonial use in an urban fantasy or themed environment.
description: A double-headed, ornate battle axe with icy blue blades, dark metallic detailing, and a decorated, straight handle with turquoise accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing both large, translucent blue blades and the ornate central metallic head.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the blades and the cylindrical handle.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with both blades and decorative head visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thinness of the axe and the straight handle.
attribute_handle_type: Straight cylindrical handle, dark metal with turquoise decorative bands, textured grip, rounded pommel.
attribute_blade_design: Double-headed, symmetrical, wide crescent blades with translucent blue marbling, ornate central metallic head, no beard or poll.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged and banded mounting with decorative metallic reinforcement.
